accept.reason: node and firebase genuinely apply but their packs' near-root fingerprints (marker at the repo root or one directory down) don't reach them under this repo's nested Firebase layout: node's package.json is at firebase/functions/package.json (two directories down, past node's intentional near-root cap that keeps nested fixtures from tripping it), and firebase.json is at firebase/firebase.json (one down) — which the exact-root firebase fingerprint on main can't see. Once Claudinite PR #190 (near-root firebase detection) lands and the mount re-syncs, firebase auto-detects and can be dropped from this acceptance, leaving only node. flutter, android, ios, and executable-requirements all fingerprint-match (app/, app/android, app/ios, dev/requirements/requirements.md) and are declared without acceptance.
